name: hyperflow
description: Fourteen specialized slash commands turn one Claude session into a structured multi-agent engineering pipeline. Thinking models orchestrate, triage, and review; worker models execute in parallel — every step is a Worker → Reviewer pair, and every non-trivial phase fans into sub-phases with their own reviewers. Auto-routing is on by default — say 'audit the diff', 'debug this test', or 'brainstorm a notification system' and the orchestrator routes to the right skill without the /hyperflow:* prefix. /hyperflow:spec asks the questions a senior engineer would; /hyperflow:scope decomposes into a batched task graph; /hyperflow:dispatch fans out persona-stitched workers under tiered review; /hyperflow:amplify rewrites a rough prompt into a high-quality one before you run it. 15 composable personas, 6 adaptive flow profiles, and persistent project memory compound across sessions. Works across Claude Code, OpenCode, and Antigravity.
